authShell.title: A calmer desk for meetings, rooms, and recurring coordination.
authShell.description: MeetFlow places schedules, room load, and pending actions on one clear surface so teams can decide faster.

quiet.title: Quiet Scheduling
quiet.detail: Time, availability, and decisions stay in focus instead of being buried under interface noise.

room.title: Room Clarity
room.detail: Capacity, location, and equipment show up before conflicts start to spread.

recurring.title: Recurring Rhythm
recurring.detail: Standups, weekly reviews, and monthly sessions all live in one steady operating cadence.

login.caption: Welcome Back
login.title: Sign In
login.description: Return to today’s operations desk to review meetings, room load, and the next actions in one place.

register.caption: Set Up Workspace Access
register.title: Register
register.description: Create accounts for hosts and participants so meetings, rooms, and recurring series stay visible to the right people.
register.name: Name

createMeeting.title: Create Meeting
createMeeting.description: Lock the rhythm, secure the room, and add just enough context so the meeting feels prepared before it begins.
createMeeting.endPreview: The end time will appear here
createMeeting.roomHint: Location and capacity will appear after selection
createMeeting.participantsHint: Select who needs to join this meeting.
createMeeting.noMoreParticipants: All available users are already selected.
createMeeting.recurrenceHintA: Use daily, weekly, or monthly cadence when the same room and timing should hold across repeated sessions.
createMeeting.recurrenceHintB: Keep agenda notes light so hosts can share context quickly without adding extra overhead.
createMeeting.descriptionPlaceholder: Give participants a concise meeting overview.
createMeeting.agendaPlaceholder:
1. Review goals
2. Discuss blockers
3. Confirm next actions
createMeeting.nextDescription: MeetFlow checks room conflicts, creates the meeting, and places it on the daily desk immediately.
createMeeting.timeHint: Use local time. Meeting data is saved with timezone-aware timestamps.
createMeeting.noPastTime: Start time cannot be in the past
createMeeting.endAfterStart: End time must be later than start time

editMeeting.title: Edit Meeting
editMeeting.description: Update schedule, room, and participants without leaving the current workflow.
editMeeting.hint: Changes are applied immediately after saving.

createRoom.title: Create Room
createRoom.description: Add a room once so everyone can pick it quickly while arranging meetings.
createRoom.equipmentHint: Use commas or line breaks to separate items.
createRoom.hintA: Clear location names help teammates find the room faster.
createRoom.hintB: Add practical equipment only so booking decisions stay accurate.
createRoom.nextDescription: The room will appear immediately in room list and meeting creation options.

meetingList.title: Meetings
meetingList.description: See what is happening today, which rooms are in use, and where the next decision is waiting.
meetingList.noAttention: Nothing needs attention right now. Use the moment to reserve rooms or plan the next recurring ritual.
meetingList.optimizeDescription: Time, status, and room context stay visible first so you can scan quickly before opening detail.
meetingList.noMeetings: No meetings found yet. Start with a new booking to seed today’s schedule.
meetingList.noNotes: No meeting notes yet. Open the detail page to add agenda or attendee context.
meetingList.noRecurring: No recurring meetings yet. This is a good place to track weekly reviews and recurring standups.

meetingDetail.descriptionFallback: No description yet. Use the agenda and participants panels to add more operating context.
meetingDetail.readinessHint: Hosts can manage timing and room details here, while participants can confirm attendance when needed.
meetingDetail.agendaFallback: No agenda added yet. Capture the decision points or sequence here once the structure is known.
meetingDetail.recurringSingle: This meeting stands alone, so the detail view stays focused on one date and one room allocation.
meetingDetail.recurringTemplate: This meeting repeats on a {{cadence}} rhythm. Keep the room and participant setup stable unless the whole cadence shifts.
meetingDetail.manageParticipantsHint: Hosts can add or remove attendees before the meeting starts.
meetingDetail.noMoreParticipants: All available users are already selected.

rooms.title: Rooms
rooms.description: Scan location, capacity, and equipment in a calmer way before a booking starts to sprawl.
rooms.empty: No rooms available yet. Add a meeting space first so planning can start around capacity and equipment.
rooms.largeRoomHint: Suitable for planning sessions, larger reviews, and broader group discussions.
rooms.smallRoomHint: Best suited to smaller syncs, 1:1s, and tighter working sessions.
